a.xlink:title: Pure-virtual base class for all autonomous steps.
Drive straight with a linear velocity ramp-up phase.
Calls Strategy::advanceCycle() once in start() and immediately finishes.
Sequences heap-allocated child AutoStep objects, deleting each upon completion.
Wraps a lazily-constructed child step that is created by a factory at start() time.
Waits for a configurable duration (ms) then completes.
Calls Miner::deployRamp() in start() and finishes immediately.
Poll the color sensor for a configurable window, then finish.
Commands the drive to follow a radius-constrained arc until an angle or distance target is met.
Drive in a straight line for targetDistance meters at targetVelocity m/s.
Follow a line autonomously until the distance sensor indicates a wall at _target cm.
Follow a constant-radius arc until the accumulated heading changes by angleToTurnDeg.
Follow a constant-radius arc until the odometry distance increases by _target_distance.
Approach a wall using the front distance sensor until within 0.5 cm of _target.
Triggers Shooter::fire() and holds for _time ms before calling Shooter::stop().
Follow the floor line at a fixed velocity for _target meters.
Push the block into the left or right slot of the hopper based on Strategy::IndexDirection.
Mine a block by executing a set number of servo press cycles.
Runs the miner and shooter autofire concurrently for desiredSeconds seconds.
Runs a collection of AutoStep children in parallel each tick.
Placeholder step for placing a block on the crafting table at the correct cycle position.
Placeholder step that discards an unwanted block (completes immediately).
Drives a looping planning function that supplies child steps on demand.
Inline strategy state machine that decides, scans, mines, stores, and crafts.
